headline: A Look At DuPont de Nemours (DD) Valuation After New AI Collaboration And Product Launches
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) is in focus after announcing an AI-focused collaboration with Uncountable, along with fresh product launches in surfaces and biopharma systems, prompting investors to reassess how its R&D pipeline might tie into valuation. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. At a recent share price of US$46.24, DuPont de Nemours has posted a 13.14% year to date share price return, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 67.77% and 3 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Huntsman Annual Meeting: Shareholders Reject Independent Chair Proposal as Moody’s Downgrade Looms
summary: Huntsman (NYSE:HUN) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders virtually on Thursday morning, with Chairman, President and CEO Peter Huntsman presiding.
